title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Big Mom, Toko, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They're approach- ing from the southeastern seas!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shoot 'em full of holes! Don't you dare let her enter this country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: they've tied ropes to the Koi and are being towed in!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big mom's information network's the best in the busi-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We knew these idiots were coming! Sink them already!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no use! They're reflecting our cannon- fire!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Zeus! You're comin' back with me, too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't let her in, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: She's actually going up the water- fall!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Are Big Mom's little brats with her?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought fish could climb a water- fall!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: Her kids are her com- manders!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If she comes ashore, it'll be all-out war!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But we're not equipped to launch a counterattack at the top of the falls!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Mamaa Mama Mama Mama Mama Mama Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah hah ha

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 40 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
